name: Risotto with Cashew Nuts (Marguerite Patten)
recipeIngredient: 10 oz mixed Basmati and wild rice
5 fl dry white wine or extra water
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onion.
2. Dice the red pepper; wipe and slice the mushrooms.
3. Heat the olive oil in a pan, add the chopped onion. Cook gently for 5 minutes.
4. Add the rice to the pan and stir well to coat all the rice grains in the oil.
5. Add the wine (or water) and bring the mixture to boiling point.
6. Simmer for 15 minutes without covering the saucepan.
7. Stir once, then add the ketchup, red pepper, frozen peas, and mushrooms, along with seasoning to taste.
8. Check there is still some liquid left in the pan; if not, add a little more water.
9. Cover the saucepan and simmer for 15 minutes or until the rice is tender and all the excess liquid has evaporated.
10. Add the cashew nuts and grated Parmesan cheese, cover the pan, stand off the heat for 5 minutes, then serve with crusty French bread.
